```{r}
#| output: asis
cat(sR$methods$pooled_rate, "\n")
cat("\n", sR$methods$quartiles, "\n")

if (include_rate_ci) cat("\n", sR$methods$ci_rates, "\n")
if (include_quartile_ci) cat("\n", sR$methods$ci_quartile_bootstrap, "\n")
if (auto_quartile_ci) cat("\n", sR$methods$ci_quartile_auto_note, "\n")
```

`r sR$methods$sparse_data`
